name: accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, delayed payment confirmations cause cash flow gaps. We aggregate invoice payment confirmations and send weekly summaries instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets.
features: Weekly summary reports of payment confirmations
Manual entry option for missing confirmations
Email notifications for new payment confirmations
